scripts.text:
-- Update Sales Tax record with TABC fk where business_key matches
UPDATE mp
SET
    mp.fk_tabc_license_id = t.license_id,
    mp.license_status     = t.license_status,
    mp.source_type        = 'BOTH',
    mp.updated_at         = CONVERT(NVARCHAR, GETDATE(), 120)
FROM dbo.master_permits mp
INNER JOIN dbo.tabc_permits t
    ON mp.business_key = CONCAT(t.trade_name, '-', t.address, '-', t.city)
WHERE mp.source_type = 'SALESTAX';

-- Delete the now-duplicate TABC only record
DELETE FROM dbo.master_permits
WHERE source_type = 'TABC'
AND business_key IN (
    SELECT business_key FROM dbo.master_permits
    WHERE source_type = 'BOTH'
);

INSERT INTO dbo.master_permits (
    source_type, business_key,
    business_name, legal_owner, address, city, state, zip, county_code,
    permit_issue_date, license_status, fk_taxpayer_number, fk_tabc_license_id,
    created_at, updated_at
)
SELECT
    'SALESTAX',
    CONCAT(ISNULL(outlet_name, taxpayer_number), '-', outlet_address, '-', outlet_city),
    outlet_name, taxpayer_name, outlet_address, outlet_city, outlet_state,
    outlet_zip_code, outlet_county_code,
    outlet_permit_issue_date, NULL, taxpayer_number, NULL,
    CONVERT(NVARCHAR, GETDATE(), 120), CONVERT(NVARCHAR, GETDATE(), 120)
FROM dbo.taxpayers_main
WHERE NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM dbo.master_permits
    WHERE business_key = CONCAT(ISNULL(outlet_name, taxpayer_number), '-', outlet_address, '-', outlet_city)
    AND source_type = 'SALESTAX'
);

-- STEP 1: Standardize Text Columns
UPDATE dbo.taxpayers_main
SET
    taxpayer_name    = UPPER(LTRIM(RTRIM(taxpayer_name))),
    taxpayer_address = UPPER(LTRIM(RTRIM(REPLACE(taxpayer_address, '%', 'C/O')))),
    taxpayer_city    = UPPER(LTRIM(RTRIM(taxpayer_city))),
    outlet_name      = UPPER(LTRIM(RTRIM(outlet_name))),
    outlet_address   = UPPER(LTRIM(RTRIM(REPLACE(outlet_address, '%', 'C/O')))),
    outlet_city      = UPPER(LTRIM(RTRIM(outlet_city)));

-- STEP 2: Convert Date Columns
UPDATE dbo.taxpayers_main
SET
    outlet_permit_issue_date = CONVERT(DATE, outlet_permit_issue_date),
    outlet_first_sales_date  = CONVERT(DATE, outlet_first_sales_date);

-- STEP 4: Decode Outlet County Code
UPDATE dbo.taxpayers_main
SET outlet_county_code =
    CASE outlet_county_code
        WHEN '011' THEN 'Bastrop'
        WHEN '227' THEN 'Travis'
        WHEN '075' THEN 'Fayette'
        WHEN '045' THEN 'Colorado'
        ELSE 'Other County'
    END;

-- STEP 5: Decode Organization Type
UPDATE dbo.taxpayers_main
SET taxpayer_organization_type =
    CASE taxpayer_organization_type
        WHEN 'CT' THEN 'Texas Domestic Profit Corporation'
        WHEN 'CL' THEN 'Texas Limited Liability Company'
        WHEN 'CN' THEN 'Texas Domestic Nonprofit Corporation'
        WHEN 'CF' THEN 'Foreign Out-of-State Profit Corporation'
        WHEN 'CI' THEN 'Foreign Limited Liability Company'
        WHEN 'CM' THEN 'Foreign Out-of-State Nonprofit Corporation'
        WHEN 'CP' THEN 'Professional Corporation'
        WHEN 'CU' THEN 'Foreign Professional Corporation'
        WHEN 'PI' THEN 'Individual General Partnership'
        WHEN 'PB' THEN 'Business General Partnership'
        WHEN 'PL' THEN 'Texas Limited Partnership'
        WHEN 'PF' THEN 'Foreign Limited Partnership'
        WHEN 'PV' THEN 'Texas Joint Venture'
        WHEN 'PW' THEN 'Foreign Joint Venture'
        WHEN 'AP' THEN 'Professional Association'
        WHEN 'AB' THEN 'Texas Business Association'
        WHEN 'AC' THEN 'Foreign Business Association'
        WHEN 'GC' THEN 'Government - City'
        WHEN 'GO' THEN 'Government - County'
        WHEN 'GS' THEN 'Government - School District'
        WHEN 'GT' THEN 'Government - Texas State Agency'
        WHEN 'GU' THEN 'Government - State University'
        WHEN 'IS' THEN 'Individual Sole Owner'
        WHEN 'ES' THEN 'Estate'
        WHEN 'TR' THEN 'Trust'
        WHEN 'UK' THEN 'Unknown'
        ELSE 'Unknown Organization Type'
    END;

-- STEP 6: Decode NAICS Code
UPDATE dbo.taxpayers_main
SET outlet_naics_code =
    CASE outlet_naics_code
        WHEN '441110' THEN 'New Car Dealers'
        WHEN '441120' THEN 'Used Car Dealers'
        WHEN '441300' THEN 'Automotive Parts & Accessories'
        WHEN '442110' THEN 'Furniture Stores'
        WHEN '443142' THEN 'Electronics Stores'
        WHEN '444110' THEN 'Home Centers'
        WHEN '444130' THEN 'Hardware Stores'
        WHEN '445110' THEN 'Supermarkets & Grocery Stores'
        WHEN '445120' THEN 'Convenience Stores'
        WHEN '445310' THEN 'Beer, Wine & Liquor Stores'
        WHEN '446110' THEN 'Pharmacies & Drug Stores'
        WHEN '447110' THEN 'Gasoline Stations with Convenience Stores'
        WHEN '447190' THEN 'Other Gasoline Stations'
        WHEN '448110' THEN 'Mens Clothing Stores'
        WHEN '448120' THEN 'Womens Clothing Stores'
        WHEN '448140' THEN 'Family Clothing Stores'
        WHEN '451110' THEN 'Sporting Goods Stores'
        WHEN '451211' THEN 'Book Stores'
        WHEN '452210' THEN 'Department Stores'
        WHEN '453110' THEN 'Florists'
        WHEN '453220' THEN 'Gift Novelty & Souvenir Stores'
        WHEN '453310' THEN 'Used Merchandise Stores'
        WHEN '453998' THEN 'Miscellaneous Retail Stores'
        WHEN '522298' THEN 'Pawn Shops & Other Consumer Lending'
        WHEN '722110' THEN 'Full-Service Restaurants'
        WHEN '722210' THEN 'Limited-Service Eating Places'
        WHEN '722410' THEN 'Drinking Places - Alcoholic Beverages'
        WHEN '722511' THEN 'Full-Service Restaurants'
        WHEN '722513' THEN 'Limited-Service Restaurants'
        WHEN '722515' THEN 'Snack & Nonalcoholic Beverage Bars'
        WHEN '236115' THEN 'New Single-Family Home Construction'
        WHEN '236118' THEN 'Residential Remodelers'
        WHEN '236220' THEN 'Commercial & Institutional Building Construction'
        WHEN '238110' THEN 'Poured Concrete Foundation Contractors'
        WHEN '238210' THEN 'Electrical Contractors'
        WHEN '238220' THEN 'Plumbing Heating & Air-Conditioning'
        WHEN '238320' THEN 'Painting & Wall Covering Contractors'
        WHEN '238330' THEN 'Flooring Contractors'
        WHEN '424720' THEN 'Petroleum & Petroleum Products Wholesalers'
        WHEN '424810' THEN 'Beer & Ale Merchant Wholesalers'
        WHEN '531110' THEN 'Lessors of Residential Buildings'
        WHEN '531120' THEN 'Lessors of Nonresidential Buildings'
        WHEN '541511' THEN 'Custom Computer Programming Services'
        WHEN '541512' THEN 'Computer Systems Design Services'
        WHEN '561720' THEN 'Janitorial Services'
        WHEN '561730' THEN 'Landscaping Services'
        WHEN '611110' THEN 'Elementary & Secondary Schools'
        WHEN '621111' THEN 'Offices of Physicians'
        WHEN '621210' THEN 'Offices of Dentists'
        WHEN '622110' THEN 'General Medical & Surgical Hospitals'
        WHEN '711219' THEN 'Other Spectator Sports'
        WHEN '721110' THEN 'Hotels & Motels'
        WHEN '811111' THEN 'General Automotive Repair'
        WHEN '811192' THEN 'Car Washes'
        WHEN '812111' THEN 'Barber Shops'
        WHEN '812112' THEN 'Beauty Salons'
        WHEN '812113' THEN 'Nail Salons'
        WHEN '812990' THEN 'Other Personal Services'
        WHEN '813110' THEN 'Religious Organizations'
        WHEN '813410' THEN 'Civic & Social Organizations'
        ELSE 'Other Business Activity'
    END;

-- STEP 7: Filter Org Types Starting with B
DELETE FROM dbo.taxpayers_main
WHERE taxpayer_organization_type LIKE 'B%';

-- STEP 8: Filter Outlet Number >= 20
DELETE FROM dbo.taxpayers_main
WHERE TRY_CAST(outlet_number AS INT) >= 20;

INSERT INTO dbo.master_permits (
    source_type, business_key,
    business_name, legal_owner, address, city, state, zip, county_code,
    permit_issue_date, license_status, fk_taxpayer_number, fk_tabc_license_id,
    created_at, updated_at
)
SELECT
    'TABC',
    CONCAT(ISNULL(trade_name, license_id), '-', address, '-', city),
    trade_name, owner, address, city, state, zip, county,
    current_issued_date, license_status, NULL, license_id,
    CONVERT(NVARCHAR, GETDATE(), 120), CONVERT(NVARCHAR, GETDATE(), 120)
FROM dbo.tabc_permits
WHERE NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM dbo.master_permits
    WHERE business_key = CONCAT(ISNULL(trade_name, license_id), '-', address, '-', city)
    AND source_type = 'TABC'
);

-- STEP 1: Increase Column Sizes
ALTER TABLE dbo.tabc_permits ALTER COLUMN county NVARCHAR(255);
ALTER TABLE dbo.tabc_permits ALTER COLUMN license_type NVARCHAR(255);

-- STEP 2: Standardize Text Columns
UPDATE dbo.tabc_permits
SET
    trade_name   = UPPER(LTRIM(RTRIM(trade_name))),
    owner        = UPPER(LTRIM(RTRIM(owner))),
    address      = UPPER(LTRIM(RTRIM(address))),
    city         = UPPER(LTRIM(RTRIM(city))),
    state        = UPPER(LTRIM(RTRIM(state))),
    mail_address = UPPER(LTRIM(RTRIM(mail_address))),
    mail_city    = UPPER(LTRIM(RTRIM(mail_city))),
    mail_state   = UPPER(LTRIM(RTRIM(mail_state)));

-- STEP 3: Convert Date Columns
UPDATE dbo.tabc_permits
SET
    current_issued_date = CONVERT(DATE, current_issued_date),
    status_change_date  = CONVERT(DATE, status_change_date),
    expiration_date     = CONVERT(DATE, expiration_date),
    original_issue_date = CONVERT(DATE, original_issue_date);

-- STEP 4: Decode County
UPDATE dbo.tabc_permits
SET county =
    CASE LTRIM(RTRIM(county))
        WHEN '011' THEN 'Bastrop'
        WHEN '227' THEN 'Travis'
        WHEN '075' THEN 'Fayette'
        WHEN '045' THEN 'Colorado'
    END
WHERE LTRIM(RTRIM(county)) IN ('011', '227', '075', '045');

-- STEP 5: Decode License Type
UPDATE dbo.tabc_permits
SET license_type =
    CASE LTRIM(RTRIM(license_type))
        WHEN 'MB'  THEN 'Mixed Beverage Permit'
        WHEN 'BG'  THEN 'Wine and Malt Beverage Retailers Permit'
        WHEN 'BE'  THEN 'Beer Retailers On-Premise License'
        WHEN 'BF'  THEN 'Beer Retailers Off-Premise License'
        WHEN 'BQ'  THEN 'Wine and Malt Beverage Retailers Off-Premise Permit'
        WHEN 'P'   THEN 'Package Store Permit'
        WHEN 'Q'   THEN 'Wine-Only Package Store Permit'
        WHEN 'N'   THEN 'Private Club Registration Permit'
        WHEN 'NB'  THEN 'Private Club Malt Beverage and Wine Permit'
        WHEN 'NE'  THEN 'Private Club Exemption Permit'
        WHEN 'D'   THEN 'Distillers and Rectifiers Permit'
        WHEN 'G'   THEN 'Winery Permit'
        WHEN 'BB'  THEN 'General Distributors License'
        WHEN 'BC'  THEN 'Branch Distributors License'
        WHEN 'BW'  THEN 'Brewers License'
        WHEN 'BP'  THEN 'Brewpub License'
        WHEN 'W'   THEN 'Wholesalers Permit'
        WHEN 'X'   THEN 'General Class B Wholesalers Permit'
        WHEN 'S'   THEN 'Nonresident Sellers Permit'
        WHEN 'DS'  THEN 'Out-of-State Winery Direct Shippers Permit'
        WHEN 'BN'  THEN 'Nonresident Brewers License'
        WHEN 'CD'  THEN 'Consumer Delivery Permit'
        WHEN 'TR'  THEN 'Passenger Transportation Permit'
        WHEN 'FB'  THEN 'Food and Beverage Certificate'
        WHEN 'LB'  THEN 'Late Hours Certificate'
        ELSE 'Unknown License Type'
    END;

-- STEP 6: Standardize Zip Codes
UPDATE dbo.tabc_permits
SET zip = LEFT(REPLICATE('0', 5 - LEN(LTRIM(RTRIM(zip)))) + LTRIM(RTRIM(zip)), 5)
WHERE zip IS NOT NULL;

UPDATE dbo.tabc_permits
SET mail_zip = LEFT(REPLICATE('0', 5 - LEN(LTRIM(RTRIM(mail_zip)))) + LTRIM(RTRIM(mail_zip)), 5)
WHERE mail_zip IS NOT NULL;
